title: Expand the RMS Sidebar and Open Map Monitor
summary: Use the RMS sidebar menu to access the Map Monitor screen. The source describes the sidebar as sometimes hidden, explains that it can be expanded or collapsed, and identifies Map Monitor as the second menu option and a primary workspace for viewing the map and AGV movements.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when navigating within the RMS application to reach the Map Monitor screen from the RMS home or navigation screen, especially when the sidebar menu is hidden.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to guess alternate menu paths if the source-identified Map Monitor entry cannot be confirmed.
Do not use this procedure if the sidebar cannot be expanded or the Map Monitor option is not visible; escalate for support instead.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Navigate the RMS interface, expand the sidebar if needed, select Map Monitor, and verify the map and AGV movement view opens.

safety_notes: This source-backed procedure is limited to RMS screen navigation.
Stop and escalate if the sidebar cannot be expanded or if the Map Monitor option is not visible.
Do not guess other menu options if the source-identified Map Monitor entry cannot be confirmed.
access_or_tools_needed: RMS home screen or navigation screen with sidebar menu

system_preconditions: RMS home screen or navigation screen with sidebar menu is available

visual_references.description: Training slide showing RMS home screen navigation elements, including the sidebar expansion concept and Map Monitor as a primary workspace.

steps.title: Check whether the RMS sidebar menu is hidden
steps.purpose: Determine whether the sidebar must be expanded before navigation can continue.
steps.instruction: Look at the RMS screen and determine whether the sidebar menu is currently hidden or already visible.
steps.expected_result: The current sidebar state is identified.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator can clearly tell whether the sidebar is hidden or expanded.
steps.failure_condition: The sidebar state cannot be determined from the current screen.

actions.label: Inspect sidebar state
actions.exact_action: Check whether the RMS sidebar menu is hidden on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: RMS home screen navigation area showing the sidebar menu concept and the expand/collapse behavior.

stop_or_escalate_if: The current screen does not allow the operator to determine whether the sidebar is hidden or expanded.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The sidebar menu is sometimes hidden and can be expanded by clicking the referenced control; the slide also notes the menu can be expanded or collapsed.

steps.title: Expand the sidebar menu if it is hidden
steps.purpose: Make the navigation menu visible so the Map Monitor option can be selected.
steps.instruction: If the menu is hidden, click the menu expand control referenced in the source to expand it.
steps.expected_result: The sidebar menu becomes visible in its expanded state.
steps.healthy_condition: The sidebar is expanded and menu options are visible.
steps.failure_condition: The sidebar does not expand or the menu options remain unavailable.

actions.label: Expand sidebar
actions.exact_action: If the menu is hidden, click the menu expand control referenced in the source to expand it.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The RMS screen area showing the sidebar expand control and the expanded versus collapsed menu state.

stop_or_escalate_if: The expand control cannot be identified on the screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The sidebar menu is sometimes hidden and can be expanded by clicking the referenced control; the slide also notes the menu can be expanded or collapsed.

steps.title: Locate the Map Monitor option in the expanded sidebar
steps.purpose: Confirm the correct navigation target before selecting it.
steps.instruction: In the expanded sidebar, locate the second option labeled Map Monitor.
steps.expected_result: The Map Monitor menu option is identified in the sidebar.
steps.healthy_condition: The second option in the expanded menu is visible and labeled Map Monitor.
steps.failure_condition: The Map Monitor option is not visible or cannot be confirmed as the second option.

actions.label: Find Map Monitor
actions.exact_action: In the expanded sidebar, locate the second option labeled Map Monitor.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The expanded sidebar menu and the Map Monitor entry identified as the second option.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Map Monitor option is not visible.
The operator cannot confirm the source-identified Map Monitor entry.
Another menu option would need to be guessed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The second option in the expanded menu is Map Monitor, where users will probably spend most of their time; the slide says Map Monitor allows viewing the map and AGV movements.

steps.title: Select Map Monitor
steps.purpose: Open the primary RMS workspace for map and AGV movement visibility.
steps.expected_result: The system begins opening the Map Monitor view.
steps.healthy_condition: The Map Monitor selection is accepted and the view changes toward the map workspace.
steps.failure_condition: Selecting Map Monitor does not open the expected view.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Map Monitor option in the expanded sidebar before selection.

stop_or_escalate_if: Selecting Map Monitor does not open the expected screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The second option in the expanded menu is Map Monitor, where users will probably spend most of their time; the slide says Map Monitor allows viewing the map and AGV movements.

steps.title: Verify the Map Monitor view is open
steps.purpose: Confirm that the intended RMS workspace has opened successfully.
steps.instruction: Verify that the Map Monitor view opens and shows the map and AGV movements.
steps.expected_result: The Map Monitor screen is open and the user can view the map and AGV movements.
steps.healthy_condition: The Map Monitor view is visible and shows the map and AGV movements.
steps.failure_condition: The Map Monitor view does not open, or the map and AGV movements are not visible.

actions.label: Confirm Map Monitor view
actions.exact_action: Verify that the Map Monitor view opens and shows the map and AGV movements.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: A source-backed example of the RMS navigation slide identifying Map Monitor as the place to view the map and AGV movements.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Map Monitor view does not open.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The second option in the expanded menu is Map Monitor, where users will probably spend most of their time; the slide says Map Monitor allows viewing the map and AGV movements.

success_criteria: The sidebar is expanded if it was initially hidden.
The Map Monitor option is located in the expanded sidebar.
The Map Monitor view opens successfully.
The user can view the map and AGV movements.
healthy_conditions: The sidebar can be expanded or is already visible.
Map Monitor is visible as the second option in the expanded menu.
The Map Monitor screen shows the map and AGV movements.
failure_conditions: The Map Monitor option is not visible.
The operator cannot confirm the source-identified Map Monitor entry.
The Map Monitor view does not open or does not show the map and AGV movements.
escalation_guidance: If the sidebar cannot be expanded, stop and escalate for support.
If the Map Monitor option is not visible, stop and escalate for support.
Do not guess other menu options if the source-identified Map Monitor entry cannot be confirmed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: RMS home screen navigation elements, sidebar expansion behavior, and the Map Monitor navigation reference.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The sidebar menu is sometimes hidden and can be expanded by clicking the referenced control; the slide also notes the menu can be expanded or collapsed.
The second option in the expanded menu is Map Monitor, where users will probably spend most of their time; the slide says Map Monitor allows viewing the map and AGV movements.

missing_details: The source does not provide the exact visual label or icon name for the sidebar expand control.
The source does not provide a separate artifact showing the fully opened Map Monitor screen with map and AGV movement visibility in this packet.
The source does not specify estimated completion time.
The source does not specify supporting roles beyond the operator.
The source does not state whether production stop or LOTO is required.
